name: cpig-kinematics
description: CPig.Kinematics regression suite — M1 (skeletal diagram) through M4.6.F (animated-mechanism stop-motion fixtures). Runs in a shared Rhino instance via the cpig_slop_loader fixture. Each test loads its Slop JSON from CPig/research/slop_tests/kin_*.json, builds the canvas, and asserts on the result panels.
